title: audit-preflight output data
description: Shape of the ``data`` field on an ``audit-preflight`` envelope.

verdict.description: GO iff there are zero blockers; NO-GO otherwise.
verdict.title: Verdict

audit_id.description: The audit slug the preflight ran against, or null (standalone).
audit_id.title: Audit Id

template.description: The template path the preflight checked.
template.title: Template

template_state.description: The template's resolved state: 'clean' (committed, no changes), 'dirty' (tracked with uncommitted changes), 'untracked' (present but not committed), 'missing', 'unparseable', 'unreadable', or 'no_git' (no git repo to verify the commit-signature).
template_state.title: Template State

resuming.description: True when audit_id already has a journal (resuming); False = fresh.
resuming.title: Resuming

journal_records.description: Number of prior journal records for audit_id (0 when fresh).
journal_records.title: Journal Records

source_roots.description: The resolved source_roots (spec, else recorded config).
source_roots.title: Source Roots

input_roots.description: The resolved input_roots (spec, else recorded config).
input_roots.title: Input Roots

blockers.description: One entry per NO-GO blocker, each with its pre-drafted remedy. Empty on GO.
blockers.title: Blockers

disclosures.description: Non-blocking disclosures rendered alongside the verdict — the data-manifest drift line (Phase-1a seam) and the resuming note. NEVER flip the verdict (the attention contract).
disclosures.title: Disclosures

brief.description: The D8 decision-ready brief, code-rendered — GO, or NO-GO with each blocker named and its remedy pre-drafted. Relayed to the human VERBATIM; the verb never blocks anything itself.
brief.title: Brief

PreflightBlocker.description:
One NO-GO blocker: the failing check, what is wrong, and its remedy.

Every blocker carries a PRE-DRAFTED remedy so the brief is decision-ready —
the human reads the fix, never has to derive it.

check.description: Which substrate check produced this blocker.
check.title: Check

blocker.description: What is wrong (the NO-GO reason), stated plainly.
blocker.title: Blocker

remedy.description: The pre-drafted fix that clears this blocker.
remedy.title: Remedy

PreflightBlocker.title: audit-preflight blocker
